\---



name: Feature request

about: Propose a new feature or system for The EDEN Project

title: "\[Feature] "

labels: feature proposal

assignees: ""

\-------------



\## Feature Name



What is the feature called?



\## Summary



Briefly describe the feature.



\## Why does this belong in EDEN?



Explain why this fits the project direction and canon.



\## Required Progression Chain



What resources, tools, knowledge, or systems are required before this feature can exist?



For example:



\* Required natural resources:

\* Required tools:

\* Required processes:

\* Required previous systems:

\* Required player/world conditions:



\## Gameplay Purpose



What does this add to the game?



\## Required Assets



List any required models, textures, animations, sounds, UI, or effects.



\## Technical Notes



Describe any technical concerns, dependencies, or risks.



\## Testing Plan



How should this feature be tested in Godot?



\## Additional Notes



Add anything else relevant.
